concepts.title: Uses of Silicon
concepts.description: Silicon is widely used in the production of computer chips, solar panels, and other electronic devices. It is also used in the manufacture of concrete, ceramics, and abrasives.

concepts.title: Uses of Germanium
concepts.description: Germanium is used in the production of transistors, rectifiers, and solar cells.

concepts.title: Plastic Surgery
concepts.description: Plastic surgery involves the use of polymers to repair or replace damaged tissues in the human body.

concepts.title: Uses of PVC
concepts.description: Mnemonics: P - Pipes, V - Vinyl, C - Cables. PVC is used in the manufacture of pipes, vinyl records, and electrical cables.

concepts.title: Polythene and Polyethylene
concepts.description: Students often confuse polythene and polyethylene. Polythene is a thermoplastic polymer, while polyethylene is a thermoplastic elastomer. The main difference is that polythene is more brittle and less flexible than polyethylene.

concepts.title: SI Units for Physical Properties
concepts.description: Students should remember the SI units for physical properties such as density (kg/m3), viscosity (Pa.s), and surface tension (N/m).

concepts.title: Uses of Teflon
concepts.description: Teflon is used in the manufacture of non-stick cookware, electrical insulation, and in the production of Gore-Tex clothing.

concepts.title: Uses of Nylon
concepts.description: Nylon is used in the manufacture of textiles, tires, and in the production of fishing nets.
